# Aiki

> Aiki is a durable execution platform. Workflows are plain TypeScript that survive crashes, retry on failure, wait on humans, and coordinate across systems. The server ships as a library — run everything in a single process, or pull the server, workers, and endpoints apart as you grow; workflow code never changes.

## Getting Started

- [README](https://github.com/aikirun/aiki/blob/main/README.md): Overview and quick start
- [Installation](https://github.com/aikirun/aiki/blob/main/docs/getting-started/installation.md): Install packages, apply the schema migration, choose where the server runs
- [Quick Start](https://github.com/aikirun/aiki/blob/main/docs/getting-started/quick-start.md): A workflow running end-to-end in a single file
- [Your First Workflow](https://github.com/aikirun/aiki/blob/main/docs/getting-started/first-workflow.md): Multi-step workflow with events, child workflows, and durable sleep

## Core Concepts

- [Workflows](https://github.com/aikirun/aiki/blob/main/docs/core-concepts/workflows.md): Define durable workflows with versioning, retries, and child workflows
- [Tasks](https://github.com/aikirun/aiki/blob/main/docs/core-concepts/tasks.md): Define durable tasks with automatic retries
- [Events](https://github.com/aikirun/aiki/blob/main/docs/core-concepts/events.md): Wait for external signals with typed events
- [Sleeps](https://github.com/aikirun/aiki/blob/main/docs/core-concepts/sleeps.md): Durable timers that survive restarts
- [Schedules](https://github.com/aikirun/aiki/blob/main/docs/core-concepts/schedules.md): Cron and interval-based recurring workflows
- [Workers](https://github.com/aikirun/aiki/blob/main/docs/core-concepts/workers.md): Execute workflows with horizontal scaling
- [Client](https://github.com/aikirun/aiki/blob/main/docs/core-concepts/client.md): Typed connection to the Aiki server, embedded or remote

## Guides

- [Determinism](https://github.com/aikirun/aiki/blob/main/docs/guides/determinism.md): Writing deterministic workflows
- [Retry Strategies](https://github.com/aikirun/aiki/blob/main/docs/guides/retry-strategies.md): Configure retry behavior
- [Reference IDs](https://github.com/aikirun/aiki/blob/main/docs/guides/reference-ids.md): Deduplication and idempotency
- [Refactoring Workflows](https://github.com/aikirun/aiki/blob/main/docs/guides/refactoring-workflows.md): Change workflow code without breaking in-flight runs
- [Reliable Hooks](https://github.com/aikirun/aiki/blob/main/docs/guides/reliable-hooks.md): Reliable webhook handling
- [Dependency Injection](https://github.com/aikirun/aiki/blob/main/docs/guides/dependency-injection.md): Inject dependencies into workflows and tasks
- [IAM](https://github.com/aikirun/aiki/blob/main/docs/guides/iam.md): Multi-tenancy, API keys, and dashboard auth — optional, off by default

## Architecture

- [Overview](https://github.com/aikirun/aiki/blob/main/docs/architecture/overview.md): How orchestration, execution, and state fit together
- [Server](https://github.com/aikirun/aiki/blob/main/docs/architecture/server.md): The server library, work distribution, and background jobs
- [Subscribers](https://github.com/aikirun/aiki/blob/main/docs/architecture/subscribers.md): Work discovery and fault tolerance

## Examples

- [Fan-out/Gather](https://github.com/aikirun/aiki/blob/main/examples/src/workflows/fan-out-gather.ts): Parallel child workflows with result aggregation
- [Long-running Pipeline](https://github.com/aikirun/aiki/blob/main/examples/src/workflows/long-running-pipeline.ts): Durable sleep + human-in-the-loop approval
- [Cancellation Cascade](https://github.com/aikirun/aiki/blob/main/examples/src/workflows/cancellation-cascade.ts): Parent-child cancellation propagation
- [Parallel Tasks](https://github.com/aikirun/aiki/blob/main/examples/src/workflows/concurrent-tasks.ts): Concurrent task execution
- [Versioning](https://github.com/aikirun/aiki/blob/main/examples/src/workflows/versioning.ts): Multiple workflow versions side by side
- [Retry Until Success](https://github.com/aikirun/aiki/blob/main/examples/src/workflows/retry-until-success.ts): Task retry policies in action

## Packages

- [@aikirun/workflow](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@aikirun/workflow): Define workflows and tasks
- [@aikirun/client](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@aikirun/client): Typed connection to the Aiki server (embedded or hosted)
- [@aikirun/worker](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@aikirun/worker): Long-lived worker for pull-based execution
- [@aikirun/server](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@aikirun/server): Embeddable server library
- [@aikirun/endpoint](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@aikirun/endpoint): Run workflows on serverless platforms via push instead of pull
- [@aikirun/iam](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@aikirun/iam): Multi-tenancy, API keys, and dashboard auth
- [@aikirun/redis](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@aikirun/redis): Sub-second timer dispatch and cross-host work distribution
